## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to discuss progress, blockers, and priorities for content management across multiple client projects.](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ehtisham has a packed day with customer meetings (Prophecy, Embed, Town) and article editing for Embed](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Feyisayo to prioritize publishing Embed's first article before their upcoming meeting](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Saskia focusing on staging approved articles for an unnamed client](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Atlas AI's output quality issues causing multiple edit rounds; team needs to simplify language and use direct speech](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Embed Project Status

  - [Ehtisham edited 1 of 3 pages, working on 2nd; 3rd page given new feedback](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Atlas AI output problematic: complicated language, indirect speech, passive voice](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Client (Invit team) previously requested simpler, more direct language](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [New strategy: If team doesn't understand content, assume readers won't either](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Feyisayo to prioritize publishing 1st article before client meeting (few hours away)](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Tutorial video available for publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [2 initially rejected topics; 1 now approved (noted in Word doc)](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Prophecy Project Update

  - [Clients excited about thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

  - [Specific mention of "data as a team sport" article; request additional material from client](https://fathom.video/share/dbozuHqH4yQDSK21nhHspMkGh-trkSt-?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
